name: EOA – Blog Post → Social Distribution
description: Triggered when a new blog/event-recap post is published (Supabase webhook). Calls the EOA social posting API which handles Blotato formatting and multi-platform distribution.

nodes.name: Supabase – Blog Post Published
nodes.notes: Trigger from Supabase Edge Function or DB webhook on INSERT into blog_posts where status = 'published'. Payload: { id, title, slug, excerpt, cover_image_url, category, published_at }

nodes.name: EOA API – Schedule Social Posts
nodes.notes: Calls POST /api/social/post — the app handles Blotato formatting, per-platform captions, and audit logging.

setupNotes: 1. Set EOA_APP_URL in N8N to the deployed app URL (e.g. https://entrepreneursofasia.com or http://localhost:3000 for dev).
2. Set ADMIN_SECRET in N8N — must match the ADMIN_SECRET env var in the Next.js app.
3. In Supabase, create a webhook or Edge Function on blog_posts INSERT (status='published') → POST to this workflow's webhook URL.
4. The Next.js app handles all Blotato credentials and per-platform formatting — no Blotato config needed in N8N.
5. Audit logs are written to the social_posts_log Supabase table automatically.
